text:
Muna (ムーナ, Mūna) was an ordinary tourist visiting Kukuroo Mountain. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 323 

Appearance

Muna was a man of average height and had medium length brown hair which he tied to the back of his head. He wore a green hoodie and gray pants. While on his tour to Kukuroo Mountain, he was seen with a camera and a backpack. 

Background

While visiting Kukuroo Mountain one day, he met Milluki, who was taking a walk with Alluka and Kalluto. Alluka then asked him to eat a raw mushroom she had picked up on the ground. Seeing this, Milluki tricked Muna into declining all of Alluka's requests to test the effects of Alluka's ability. As a result, he died and it is implied that some of his acquaintances were killed by Alluka's power as well. 

Plot

13 th Hunter Chairman Election arc

Muna is a part of a flashback detailing the discovery of the power residing in Alluka and the Zoldyck Family's attempts to understand and exploit it.
